title: Explain the Ending of the Movie please
display_title: Explain the Ending of the Movie please
wikitext:
[]: Explain the Ending of the Movie please >.<             Quote Post by DarkGodChaos » Sat Jan 07, 2006 12:48 am My friend and I just finished "End of Evangelion" after finishing the series. We didn't quite understand the ending. We both have a few questions Mine: Q: What exactly happened at the end? Q: Can some one explain in-depth the ending of Evangelion? Friends: Q: Is Asuka and Shinji the last humans? Q: Why were they the only ones that were restored? Q: What happened to the other souls? We both got generally confused at the last part of the movie. We'd really appreciate it if you could answer our questions. ~DarkGodChaos Asuka's a crazy bitch. I'm sorry it had to be said after that battle scene. CRAZY I SAY. :twisted:

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sat Jan 07, 2006 7:04 am I can't wait to see what fight these question start.

[]: Re: Explain the Ending of the Movie please >.<             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jan 07, 2006 7:06 am DarkGodChaos wrote: Q: What exactly happened at the end?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Jan 07, 2006 3:43 pm Your questions are, in essense, the reason why so many people spend so much time on the boards. To be quite frank, although we have uncovered and exposed a huge selection of the show's mysteries, we still have no working framework to explain the events of End Of Evangelion in their entireity.

[]: Re: Explain the Ending of the Movie please >.<             Quote Post by geishaboy » Wed Jan 18, 2006 7:58 am DarkGodChaos wrote: My friend and I just finished "End of Evangelion" after finishing the series. We didn't quite understand the ending. We both have a few questions Mine: Q: What exactly happened at the end?

[]: Re: Explain the Ending of the Movie please >.<             Quote Post by Archon Divinus » Wed Jan 18, 2006 4:12 pm DarkGodChaos wrote: Q: Is Asuka and Shinji the last humans?

[]:             Quote Post by AcesHigh » Wed Jan 18, 2006 9:13 pm I think the reason we don't see the others returned in-film (though they are clearly said to be) is because the director wanted to make the focus of the ending on Shinji. After all, the entire series is based on his struggles, not anybody elses. The last scene addresses the final thing on Shinji's mind..

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Thu Jan 19, 2006 1:07 pm There are several signs in the last scene that quite a lot of time has passed since Shinji and Asuka returned from LCL. One would assume that if anyone else was going to come back, they would have already done so by that time. Geishaboy- I'm sure that really helped him. :roll: You sound like that Eliza bot.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jan 19, 2006 2:57 pm @geishaboy Good points - but I think we need to engage both intellect and emotion to get the full benefit of the film. Space Penis wrote: There are several signs in the last scene that quite a lot of time has passed since Shinji and Asuka returned from LCL.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Thu Jan 19, 2006 3:51 pm If one goes by that interpretation, it may take a very long time for an individual person to return from the LCL, without Yui's help, like Asuka. Did it take her days or weeks to return I wonder? Who knows how long it will take for Maya, Aoba, Hyuga, Fuyutski, and Keel to come back. Gee what a fun group of people to be stuck with. Better than being alone though.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Thu Jan 19, 2006 4:02 pm wouldnt it just suck to be the last one to get become human again? id point n laugh at whoever it was. HAHA SLOW POKE!!! What, have to make issues? Awe dont run away! lol

[]: Re: Explain the Ending of the Movie please >.<             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Thu Jan 19, 2006 5:25 pm Archon Divinus wrote: DarkGodChaos wrote: Q: Is Asuka and Shinji the last humans?

[]: Re: Explain the Ending of the Movie please >.<             Quote Post by Archon Divinus » Thu Jan 19, 2006 6:56 pm Shin-seiki wrote: Archon Divinus wrote: DarkGodChaos wrote: Q: Is Asuka and Shinji the last humans?

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Wed Jan 25, 2006 1:33 pm Both Geishaboy and Mr. Tines have a veeery good point. To guess the meaning of the anime (the reason for my word "guess" will be told a wee-bit later), you'll need the info what you could get from watching the film itself, and your feelings from the begining to the end. These are the required data to do the analysis. Sit down and think on it. We could tell what do we think, what did we hear, but I think that it spoils the whole... ummm... scent of NGE. It feels a lot different, if you interpet the meaning, than accepting what others say. Don't you think? Why did I say "guess" instead of "interpret" or "decipher"? Because I think that Evangelion means different things to different people, although it has a basic message. If my way of interpreting the anime is right, than it is obvious why did I say "guess". We all feel different about the anime. And because of this, we all interpret it in different ways, although in facts we usually agree. But if we look at questions such as "Are Asuka and Shinji the last humans?", we have more than a dozen theories, which can be right. So as you see, this is why Neon Genesis Evangelion cannot be forgotten for those who have a heart to feel and a brain to think. It is a true mystery, because there are no real right, nor real wrong answers (lets exclude stupid ideas, okay? ). Or at least I think so. Which has no importance, if it didn't help you. I hope I could give you some advice... :? :roll:
